(2) They shall come in to force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Prasar Bharati (Broadcasting Corporation of India) Salaries, Allowances and other Conditions of Service of Chairman, Whole-time Members and Part-time Members Rules, 2000, - (a) in nile 13, for sub-rule (1), the following sub-rule shall be substituted, namely:- ■“(I) The Cfeairman and a Part-time Member shall each receive a meeting aliowMice at ihe rate of napccs frve ^lOusasd jper lu^tiiig subject to a rnaximurri aniount of rupees ten thousand per month or napees oite lakh twenty thousand per armum for Board meetings and rupees Eitecn jcar mxHiais or rupees one lakh eighty thousMid per annum for the meeting (cffltlae CtaoMiiSiees Ite Boaixi” -- 2 of 3 -- [ ’TFT I I — 3(i )] (b) in rule 14, - (i) in sub-rule (1), in the proviso, for the words '‘rupees five thousand”, the words “rupees six thousand two hundred and fifty ” shall be substituted; (ii) in sub-rule (2), in the proviso, for the words “rupees five thousand”, the words “rupees six thousand two hundred and fifty” shaii be substituted. [F. No. 12018/8/2001 -BA (P)J ~ SUPRIYA SAHU, Jt. Secy. Note;— The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide GSR number 863(E) dated the lO'" November, 2Q00 and subsequently amended vide G.S.R. 126 (E) dated I* March, 2006.
